text: :rotating_light: P0 — api error rate at 40% and climbing. all endpoints affected. war room is here, i'm first responder
here. db connections are maxed — pool shows 100/100 in use, everything else is queueing
Page the on-call immediately for any P0 — done, priya is paged and joining. sarah FYI
here. checking for a connection leak... the new webhook dispatcher from yesterday's deploy isn't releasing connections on the error path
customer comms: tom, post the status page update. 'degraded performance, investigating' for now
status page updated, enterprise accounts notified per the SLA process
confirmed — every failed webhook delivery leaks one connection. with the retry storm we exhaust the pool in ~20 min. rolling back yesterday's deploy now
rollback deployed. pool usage dropping... 80... 45... 12. error rate back under 0.5%
declaring recovery at 14:52 UTC. total impact 38 minutes. keeping the war room open another 30 min for stragglers
good response everyone. Postmortem must be filed within 48 hours — raj you're first responder so you own the doc, ACME-201 is the tracking ticket
on it. draft will be up tomorrow morning, review at thursday standup
the code fix (release connections in the error path + retry backoff) is ACME-235, i'll have it up for review today
